kind: OP-11 A/B ship-scorecard (decision-grade, pre-computed for zero-lag ship once WP-0 lands)
hypothesis: VIX-regime-conditional DAY+SIDE directional system: take the established morning VWAP day-trend side directionally ONLY in the favorable (LOW level vs trailing-median + not-rising 5-bar slope) VIX regime, one entry/session. Distilled from edge#2 divergence (day+side) + ML feature ranking (VIX #1, vix_slope5 #2) + the live vwap VIX-gate.

deploy_config.account: Safe-2 = ATM (PRIMARY/ROBUST tier). Bold = ITM-2 (disclosure tier).

data_coverage: last real-fill 2026-05-15 (data load capped at 2026-05-15; ~14d real-fills blind spot exists from 2026-05-29 to 2026-06-18 but is NOT reached by this run). ASSERTED last filled-trade date = 2026-05-15 <= 2026-05-29 (clean window).

G7_beats_random_null_L172.note: Clean null margin: OOS +$79.49 vs null mean -$4.85 (edge +$84.34/trade) and beats the LUCKIEST null seed (+$29.52). Much stronger null separation than edge #2.

G8_no_truncation_sign_L171.note: Sign HOLDS positive at chart-stop-only (G8 pass) but is only +$0.15/trade -> the OOS edge is heavily PREMIUM-STOP dependent; the directional SPY signal alone is ~breakeven OOS (C3/L58 SPY-direction != option edge). The -8% premium stop is load-bearing, not the directional read.

STANDING_BAR.drop_top5_OOS_alone_L173: Full-sample drop-top5 = +$25.91 (positive). OOS-alone drop-top5 not separately persisted by harness; top5_day_pct 45.2 is healthy (well under 200) -> not concentration-driven.

independence_vs_edge1_L174.note: EVERY edge-#4 entry day is also a vwap_continuation (#1) entry day, SAME SIDE. Edge #4 is #1's day+side pool filtered to the favorable VIX regime (80 of #1's 158 days), at ATM strike instead of #1's ITM-2. Overlap with edge #2 = 45 days. This is exactly the convergence thesis (the vwap edge IS VIX-conditional) -> #4 is a VIX-gated re-cut of #1, not an uncorrelated edge.

op16_7anchor_no_regression.verdict: NO REGRESSION (does not re-take J's losers)

anchors.2025-04-29_WINNER_Pside: edge4 fires C (opposite) -> no winner capture

op16_7anchor_no_regression.note: Edge #4 fires on NONE of J's 6 losing-side anchors (no-fire on all 3 losers, no-fire/opposite on winners). Dormant standalone edge, not a J-edge replicator. Does not modify production anchor handling -> no regression to live edge-capture.

futures_cross_check.verdict: NO futures (MES/MNQ) cell clears all 8 (most OOS-negative)
futures_cross_check.note: The captured edge lives in the 0DTE OPTION structure (ATM + -8% premium stop), NOT as a pure point-direction edge. Consistent with G8: directional SPY signal alone is ~breakeven; the option bracket is what monetizes it.

verdict_detail: ATM Safe-2 robust cell (slope=not_rising, low_margin=0.25) clears all 8 coded gates on the clean (<=2026-05-29) real-fills window with evidence_n>=15: OOS +$79.49/trade (n=21), 5/6 positive quarters, beats random null by +$84.34/trade AND beats luckiest null seed, sign-stable at chart-stop-only, drop-top5 positive, top5%=45.2. SHIPS under OP-11/OP-22 standing authorization (validated + profitable). 6 (cell,tier) combos clear all 8; this is the most robust by OOS-N. This is the cleanest of edges #2/#4 on the null-separation front.
MANDATORY_CAVEATS_for_REVOKE_note: G8 chart-stop-only OOS is only +$0.15/trade: the OOS edge is almost entirely PREMIUM-STOP dependent (the -8% bracket monetizes it). The directional VIX-regime read alone is ~breakeven OOS on options and NEGATIVE in futures. The edge is the option structure, not a tradable point-direction signal (C3/L58). Keep the -8% isolated stop load-bearing.

L174 NOT INDEPENDENT of #1: 100% same-side subset of vwap_continuation (VIX-gated re-cut). Net incremental value over already-live #1 is UNPROVEN here ('#4 VIX-favorable sub-pool vs the rest of #1' comparison not run). Treat as a VIX-overlay refinement of #1, not a parallel independent allocation.

knob disclosure: low_margin=0.25 + not_rising is one swept cell of 8; gate-1 (OOS) is OOS-only & decisive, but the regime cut WAS swept -> watch for OOS overfit. The lm=1.0 cell shows higher OOS per-trade ($200.85) but only oos_n=6 (over-concentrated) and is NOT the recommended ship cell.
ATM tier is the ship tier; ITM-2 disclosure tier also clears in 6 cells but verify independently per C29 before any Bold deploy.
